title: lindernia nutans
intro: Lindernia nutans, also known as False Frogbit or Lindernia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Linderniaceae. It is native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lindernia nutans include its ability to treat fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Lindernia nutans can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide relief from various health ailments.
